UCEISBleedingMention.description: UCEIS bleeding descriptor documented on endoscopy.

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text.
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

bleeding.description: UCEIS bleeding descriptor. NONE_VISIBLE: No visible blood. MUCOSAL: Small spots or streaks of blood adherent to the mucosal. LUMINAL_MILD: Luminal mild: mild free blood visible in the bowel lumen. LUMINAL_MODERATE_OR_SEVERE: Luminal moderate or severe: definite luminal blood that is moderate to heavy. NONE_OF_THE_ABOVE: none of the above.

UCEISBleedingMention.title: UCEISBleedingMention

UCEISErosionsUlcersMention.description: UCEIS erosions and ulcers descriptor documented on endoscopy.

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text.
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

erosions_and_ulcers.description: UCEIS erosions and ulcers descriptor. NONE: no erosions or ulcers; mucosal surface intact. EROSIONS: small superficial mucosal breaks or erosions without deeper ulceration. SUPERFICIAL_ULCER: larger ulcerated areas that remain shallow/superficial. DEEP_ULCER: deep excavated ulceration. NONE_OF_THE_ABOVE: none of the above.

UCEISErosionsUlcersMention.title: UCEISErosionsUlcersMention

has_mention.description: Indicates whether the concept was mentioned in the text.
has_mention.title: Has Mention

spans.description: The verbatim text where this concept was mentioned.
spans.title: Spans

vascular_pattern.description: UCEIS vascular pattern descriptor. NORMAL: normal vascular pattern with clearly visible mucosal vessels. PATCHY_OBLITERATION: patchy loss or partial obscuration of the normal vascular pattern. OBLITERATED: complete loss of the vascular pattern. NONE_OF_THE_ABOVE: none of the above.

UCEISVascularPatternMention.title: UCEISVascularPatternMention
